videos.title: Don't Waste Your Time On Things You Don't Want To Do
videos.description:
#Repost @7daygenius

• • •

You already know what needs to go. You’re just not ready to let it go yet.

4,000 weeks sounds like a lot until you do the math on how many you’ve already spent on things that don’t matter.

Every week wasted on obligations you resent, relationships that drain you, or work that numbs you is a week you don’t get back.
The brutal truth? You’re not short on time. You’re short on boundaries.

Stop waiting for the “right moment” to cut what’s killing your potential. The cost of staying is higher than the cost of leaving.

-

videos.title: Use subagents to get multi-perspective feedback before sharing work with real people
videos.description: JJ's "review agent" skill spins up three different AI personas—like an AI builder, a security-focused executive, and a concerned parent—each with fresh context and a specific point of view. They review his work and provide feedback from different angles before he ever shows it to his team.
